meaning: n.杂志,期刊,军火库,弹药库,(枪、炮的)弹仓,胶卷盒
examples: She used to edit a women's magazine.
The new magazine has really taken off.
The magazine is still produced in-house.
Mr Cameron's interview with Total Politics magazine raised questions about the longevity of the coalition.
Talkers Magazine has consistently named him one of America's most important talk show hosts.
